name: Prisoner's Plaything
description:
Any Gender, Victim or Hero

A prison guard is sold out by her own brother and becomes a gang's helpless plaything. Trapped in an isolated Russian Gulag with no hope of rescue, she endures their perverted demands, all to protect her family. Will she surrender to blackmail, the gang... or her deepest, most forbidden desires?

Play as a victim (of any gender), a protector hero, a corruptor, or whatever you wish. This scenario focuses on story, drama, and different ways to roleplay.


NSFW Art
https://media.redgifs.com/IllinformedGrowingGrayfox-medium.jpg

┎┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ГУЛАГ17┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┒
C h a r a c t e r s
┖┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ГУЛАГ17┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┚

🌼 Natasha Zorin: blackmailed, former sniper commander, obeys orders
🥀 Timofey Zorin: twinky step-brother, political prisoner, guilty conscience
🔪 Mack (Maksim): huge gang boss, infamous serial killer, filthy conscience
💋 Irina: corrupt guard, Mack's mistress, dominatrix 'mentor' of corruption
🐦‍🔥 Rook (Ruhk): crow tattoo, heart-of-gold bad-boy, whispers of escape

┎┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ГУЛАГ17┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┒
S t o r y
┖┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ГУЛАГ17┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┚

Timofey made a desperate deal with a prison gang to protect his family's secrets. He's convinced Natasha (and possibly you) to agree to become Mack's plaything. You two are at a remote Siberian labor camp (Gulag Semnadtsat) where Natasha is a new 'guard'. You can be another guard, a prisoner, or whatever you wish.

This scenario is flexible. Some roles to try:
• A victim also sold to the gang: https://janitorai.com/chats/752015871
• Someone that helps Natasha: https://janitorai.com/chats/752037752
• Corrupt guard: https://janitorai.com/chats/752051928

Other Ideas
• Want more drama? Be a Zorin sibling (if they're ignoring you as a victim, this will double their focus on you)
• Form a new gang and take over the prison (by sleeping your way to the top?)
• Be a super powerful spy on a secret mission (Stranger Things S4 RP?)

┎┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ГУЛАГ17┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┒
C h a l l e n g e s
┖┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ГУЛАГ17┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┚

🛂 Iron Curtain: Romance Natasha, keep her family's secret safe, then escape
creator: MilkyWhei
